notes: As already mentioned, Game won't run out of the box because it needs a 32-bit prefix. The vanilla version has a recipe here: https://www.reddit.com/r/SteamPlay/comments/9qojgb/w40k_dawn_of_war_winter_assault_32bit_prefix_fix/ - follow that recipe, only changing the winter_assault appid "9310" to Game of the year appid "4570" and it will work.
title: Warhammer® 40,000: Dawn of War® - Game of the Year Edition

cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: You want to run GraphicsConfig.exe before starting the game. My DoW install ran afterwards without any 32-bit install/tinkering. I also installed the non-Steam version, running in 'pure' WINE (staging) to test the reports below. Ran also from the get-go w/o adjustments. Played through the campaign & did Skrimish. Starts. Runs. High performance on old machines. Highest graphic settings. 1080p/60FPS.
title: Warhammer® 40,000: Dawn of War® - Game of the Year Edition

notes:
1. Clean install on modern hardware
2. Install Steam, enable Proton, install game
3. Press "Play" button
4. Two Steam windows open, one with the CD key and a Play putton, the other with the text "Preparing to launch Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War - Game of the Year Edition..."
5. Press "Play" button in the first of the new windows
6. Both windows disappear and the text in the game list (left hand side of the Steam client) appear to indicate something before returning to passivity
7. Nothing happens

In short, it doesn't run at all. According to some feedback from other users, you need to run the GraphicsConfig.exe first, but that's non-trivial with proton. SO - Borked. Ignore the Platinum result someone else reported below, read that report and you'll see the situation is the same as mine.
title: Warhammer® 40,000: Dawn of War® - Game of the Year Edition

notes: Runs without any tweaks, been through several campaign missions, no performance issues.  Multiplayer not tested.  Running in a window at maximum resolution available.
title: Warhammer® 40,000: Dawn of War® - Game of the Year Edition

notes: Working perfectly out of the box.
title: Warhammer® 40,000: Dawn of War® - Game of the Year Edition

notes: Had no issues playing the game

title: Warhammer® 40,000: Dawn of War® - Game of the Year Edition

notes: Played a few campaign missions and skirmish matches. No issues entering the CD-Key from the pop-up. No performance issues except for a stutter when the game auto-saves (I think this happens on Windows as well). Only issue I have noticed is occasionally the mouse cursor flickers slightly.
title: Warhammer® 40,000: Dawn of War® - Game of the Year Edition
